name: Dual Avatar - Empowered Kon-Gyo
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>双</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>将</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>金</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>剛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
"Dual Avatar Fists - Yuhi" + 2 "Dual Avatar" monsters
If this card battles, your opponent cannot activate cards or effects until the end of the Damage Step. If this card attacks, after damage calculation: You can return 1 monster your opponent controls to the hand. When your opponent's Spell/Trap Card or effect is activated that targets this card on the field, while you control 2 or more Fusion Monsters (Quick Effect): You can negate the activation. You can only use this effect of "Dual Avatar - Empowered Kon-Gyo" once per turn.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
Activates if targeted by card effect
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
